## UX & Accessibility Checklist
<!-- Please ensure your contribution meets these standards -->
- [ ] **Semantic HTML:** Used correct HTML elements for their intended purpose.
- [ ] **Keyboard Navigation:** All interactive elements are reachable and usable via keyboard.
- [ ] **ARIA Labels:** Added descriptive `aria-label` to icon-only buttons or ambiguous elements.
- [ ] **Color Contrast:** Text and icons meet WCAG AA contrast ratios.
- [ ] **Focus States:** High-visibility focus indicators are present for all interactive elements.
- [ ] **Responsiveness:** UI works correctly across different screen sizes.
